text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 19px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', 'SimHei', 'Segoe UI', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #1a1f2b

g.text: Wong–Liu 模拟退火 · 三种移动

text.style: font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', 'SimHei', 'Segoe UI', 'DejaVu Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start; fill: #3a4252

g.text: 状态 = 规范化 Polish 串；代价 = 面积 A + λ·线长 W

g.text: M1/M2 必得规范化串；M3 可能破坏 → 反复选直到结果规范化。变化仅触及局部子树 → 代价增量重算
